title: のんびり、歩幅を合わせて

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Bright! See that elephant over there? It's the
biggest one in the zoo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh my! What a charming, looong nose it has.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm at the zoo one weekend, when I spot two
especially excited visitors.

text_block_list.name: Bright & Elephant
text_block_list.text: Pawooo!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Yep, looks like you two are in sync!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! There's a giraffe back there! Whoa, its neck
goes on forever!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: ...Gah, I forgot!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Let's go see it together, Bright!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Sure!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Amazing! All the bunnies are gathering around
you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Where did you all come from? It's lovely to
meet you, sweet rabbits.

text_block_list.name: Rabbits
text_block_list.text: Hippity-hop-hop!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Oh no! That one's running away! I'll get it to come
back, so—

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Actually, never mind! We'll wait together for the
bunny to come back on its own!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: All right. ...Hm?

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
There's plenty of time to see everything, so we
can take the leisurely route!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Tsuru... I wouldn't mind if you made a quick dash
around the zoo by yourself, you know?

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
You finally got over your cold, and this is your
first outing since then. I'm sure you're eager to
see everything you possibly can.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I tend to move at a slower pace, so it might be
more fun for you if you took a quick zip around
by yourself.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
But everything's much more fun with you by my
side!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Well, I often fall sick, which means I'm usually
stuck in the infirmary. Last time was the same too.
I'm hardly ever in our room.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
You even helped me pick an outfit for our outing
today. Not that I could wear it because I spilled
juice all over it... I was just so excited to spend
time with you!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
I'm super happy that we can hang out together
like this! So, really, let's take our time and enjoy
ourselves!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: My... I'm touched. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sun's setting as I head to the cafe. I spy the
same pair from earlier in the day, but the mood
has shifted since this morning.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... We sure played hard today...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Are you all right? Here, have some tea.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Thanks...

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: YEOWCH!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear. I'm sorry... I knew it would take me a
long time to carry our drinks back to our table, so
I asked them to make everything as hot as they
could.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I didn't want you to get cold and become sick
again...

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Oooh, that's so considerate! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
But really, I should be apologizing! It's my fault
we couldn't see everything we wanted at the zoo.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I'm just happy to be here with you, and see you
hale and hearty...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Truly... I'm happier than you could ever know.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: So I guess that means we both feel the same way.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Aww... Yeah! Exactly the same!
